description: UI MVP: React/Vite web app in web/ with Supabase auth, backend-backed game list, join-by-link flow, realtime snapshot refetch, and lightweight animations for mists/captures/combos/wins. Includes required API adjustments (JWT-derived player identity, create auto-join, list games, mists feedback fields).

userStories.title: Scaffold web frontend (React/Vite/TS + Tailwind + shadcn/ui)
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a working frontend scaffold in web/ so we can iterate on UI quickly.
acceptanceCriteria: Create a Vite React + TypeScript app under web/
Install and configure Tailwind CSS
Install shadcn/ui and render at least one shadcn component on a route
Add React Router with routes: /login, /games, /g/:gameId
Configure Vite dev proxy so requests to /api/* reach FastAPI at http://localhost:8000/*
Document canonical commands for web dev/build/test in a short web/README.md
userStories.notes: Keep styling plain shadcn/ui; we will add effects later in a dedicated story.

userStories.title: Supabase auth UI (magic link) + session restore
userStories.description: As a player, I want to log in via Supabase magic link so my games can be tied to my account.
acceptanceCriteria: Add Supabase JS client configuration via web env vars (no secrets committed)
Implement /login screen with magic link sign-in
Persist and restore session on refresh
Add logout
Unauthenticated users are redirected to /login when visiting /games or /g/:gameId
userStories.notes: MVP: email magic link only; no usernames/profile editing yet.

userStories.title: API adjustments for UI MVP (JWT identity, create auto-join, list games, mists feedback)
userStories.description: As a UI client, I want the API to be auth-scoped and UI-friendly so game list, spectator blocking, and realtime updates work end-to-end.
acceptanceCriteria: FastAPI validates Supabase JWT and derives caller user_id for game actions
Remove player_id from request bodies for join/archetype/moves/leave; server uses caller identity
POST /games auto-joins the caller as player1 and returns the GameState
Add GET /games endpoint returning games where caller is a participant
Enforce spectator blocking: non-participants cannot read game snapshots (403)
Pick starting player when game becomes ACTIVE using a deterministic RNG seeded from GameState.seed
Sudden Death alternates starting player each round
Expose per-move Mists outcome in the snapshot (e.g., last_move includes mists_roll and derived effect)
Fix Supabase schema mismatch by adding game_events.idempotency_key column (store already uses it)
Add/adjust tests covering the new auth-scoped behavior and list endpoint
userStories.notes: This story intentionally spans backend + schema to unblock the UI. Keep snapshot-first; do not add client-side rules.

userStories.title: Games list screen (/games) backed by GET /games
userStories.description: As a player, I want to see my games so I can resume or start matches.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement /games screen that fetches and renders the caller's games
Show status (waiting/active/complete) and updated_at/created_at if available
Add Create Game button that calls POST /games and navigates to /g/:gameId
Clicking a game navigates to /g/:gameId
userStories.notes: MVP: basic list; filtering/search can come later.

userStories.title: Join-by-link lobby flow (waiting state)
userStories.description: As a player, I want to join a game from a shared link and see a lobby until the match starts.
acceptanceCriteria: Implement /g/:gameId route that loads GET /games/:gameId and renders WAITING vs ACTIVE vs COMPLETE
When WAITING and the caller is not yet a participant, show a Join button
Join button calls POST /games/:gameId/join (no player_id in body) and transitions the UI
Display a copyable invite link for the current game
If the game has 2 players and the caller is not a participant, show a blocked state

userStories.title: Game room core rendering (snapshot-first)
userStories.description: As a player, I want to see the board, hands, and turn state so I can play the game.
acceptanceCriteria: Render 3x3 board with ownership styling per cell
Render the caller's hand as selectable cards (no move submission yet)
Render opponent hand as face-down count (or list if MVP prefers), plus both archetype states
Show turn indicator based on current_player_index
Show current score (controlled card count) and game result when complete
Add Leave button calling POST /games/:gameId/leave (no player_id in body)
userStories.notes: Keep UI read-only for moves in this story; move interaction comes next.

userStories.title: Place a card (no archetype power UX yet)
userStories.description: As a player, I want to place a card on my turn and see the updated snapshot.
acceptanceCriteria: Allow selecting a card from hand and an empty cell
Submit POST /games/:gameId/moves with card_key, cell_index, state_version, idempotency_key
Disable interactions when it is not the caller's turn or the game is complete
Handle 409/422 responses by showing an error and refetching GET /games/:gameId
After a successful move, update UI from the returned snapshot
userStories.notes: Keep power inputs out of scope here; focus on the base move loop.

userStories.title: Archetype selection UX
userStories.description: As a player, I want to select my archetype once so my power is available.
acceptanceCriteria: If the caller has no archetype, prompt for selection
Submit POST /games/:gameId/archetype with archetype (no player_id in body)
Display selected archetypes for both players
Display whether the caller's archetype power is available or already used
userStories.notes: MVP: simple selector UI; no lore text required.

userStories.title: Use archetype power on a move (power-specific params)
userStories.description: As a player, I want to activate my once-per-game archetype power when placing a card.
acceptanceCriteria: Add a Use Power toggle that is enabled only when archetype_used is false
Martial/Caster/Devout require no extra inputs
Skulker prompts for a side (n/e/s/w) and passes skulker_boost_side
Presence prompts for a direction (n/e/s/w) and passes presence_boost_direction
Submit moves with use_archetype=true and the correct params
On 422, show an actionable error message and refetch snapshot
userStories.notes: Do not attempt client-side prediction; server decides outcomes.

userStories.title: Realtime subscription: refetch snapshot on game_events insert
userStories.description: As a player, I want to see opponent moves without polling so the game feels alive.
acceptanceCriteria: Subscribe to Supabase Realtime inserts on game_events filtered by game_id
On INSERT, refetch GET /games/:gameId and replace local snapshot state
Unsubscribe on unmount / route change
Implement a simple fallback refetch interval when realtime disconnects
userStories.notes: Follow docs/realtime.md contract; MVP-simple refetch strategy only.

userStories.title: Make captures/combos/wins + Mists feel good (lightweight effects)
userStories.description: As a player, I want satisfying feedback for captures, combos, and Mists so the MVP is fun.
acceptanceCriteria: Animate card placement into a cell
Animate ownership flips when captures occur (including multi-flip combos)
Show a simple combo indicator when multiple flips occur from a single move
Show Mists feedback using last-move snapshot data (Fog/Omen visuals + roll) without guessing
Show an end-of-game banner when the game completes (win/lose/draw/forfeit)
userStories.notes: Keep implementation low-effort and replaceable; prefer CSS/Framer Motion-level work over heavy canvas/3D.

userStories.title: UI MVP tests: component sanity + Playwright smoke
userStories.description: As a developer, I want a minimal test suite so we can refactor UI safely.
acceptanceCriteria: Add Vitest + Testing Library tests for at least: blocked spectator view, disabled move when not your turn
Add a Playwright smoke test that exercises create -> share link -> join -> play one move
Document canonical commands to run unit + smoke tests
userStories.notes: Auth in tests may require a test-only strategy (e.g., seeded test users or a stubbed auth mode).
